headline: U.S. Dips Into Oil Reserves as Iran War Enters Its Third Month
summary: U.S. petroleum inventories are declining, although they are still above year-ago levels. Plus, market newsletter commentary on the Federal Reserve, consumer spending, and the growth of the venture-capital market.

headline: Chase Sapphire Reserve launches highest-ever 150,000-point bonus. Here's how it compares to other cards
summary: The Chase Sapphire Reserve's new 150,000-point welcome bonus is its highest offer yet. Here's how it compares to other travel rewards cards.

headline: Axos Financial Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Axos Financial (NYSE:AX) reported fiscal third-quarter 2026 results highlighted by what management described as broad-based loan growth, a sizeable jump in non-interest income, and continued strong profitability metrics.
